prose:
Fukui reactivity analysis of furan was computed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier standard) in PySCF, in the gas phase, at charge 0 and multiplicity 1 (neutral singlet). The calculation included formation of the N+1 (cation, doublet) and N−1 (anion, doublet) states to compute Fukui indices f⁺ (electrophilicity), f⁻ (nucleophilicity), and f⁰ (radical reactivity) via Mulliken population analysis. The SCF converged for all three charge states, and charge conservation checks passed (sum of f⁺ and sum of f⁻ both = 1.0), indicating reliable convergence of the ionized states. The most electrophilic site is carbon atom 4 (1-based label 5) with f⁺ = 1.924, and the most nucleophilic site is the same atom with f⁻ = 0.162. The dual descriptor (Δf = f⁺ − f⁻) confirms electrophilic activation at the α and β carbons. Geometry was user-supplied (furan.xyz); SCF converged; no warnings reported. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy.</prose>
